name: Tee Box West Haven
about: Tee Box West Haven is an indoor virtual golf simulator venue focused on player development through technology-based training. The facility is equipped with Trackman launch monitors, providing data-driven swing analysis, club fittings, and fitness programs. Its core offerings include individual and group coaching, private club sales and repairs, and event hosting for both casual players and serious golfers. Memberships provide flexible access to bays, gym facilities, and included monthly lessons. The venue operates 24 hours daily to accommodate diverse schedules and offers a comprehensive training environment with on-demand coaching resources.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman technology for precise swing and shot data analysis
24-hour access allowing practice at any time, unaffected by weather or daylight
All-inclusive membership packages with monthly coaching and gym access
Private club fitting services tailored to individual swing mechanics and goals
Community-oriented environment with leagues and events for social play

food_and_drink.notes: No bar or alcohol service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar and camera system for club and ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue provides club rentals, but members may bring their own equipment. Club fittings and repairs are also available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned as permitted, and no internal food or beverage service is advertised. The facility appears focused on golf training without catering options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time for 18 holes is provided, but the 30-minute for 90-minute on-course practice ratio suggests efficient sessions, with flexible booking for 1-2 hour bay reservations.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Box caters to juniors with youth programs, family-friendly events, and a welcoming environment for young golfers to learn the game without pressure.
